' Byggstyrning IFC import journal  (ArchiCAD "Improved IFC Import")
' Generated by Run-ByggPipelineSetup.ps1 -- do not edit manually.
'
' This journal replays the ArchiCAD "Improved IFC Import" command.
' Unlike Link IFC, this command opens its OWN file dialog (not the
' standard Revit FileDialog), so the IFC path is captured inside
' the plugin's APIStringStringMapJournalData block.
'
' IMPORTANT: The {{ARCHICAD_IMPORT_COMMANDS}} block below is
' version-specific.  Re-capture it with Capture-ArchiCADJournal.ps1
' after upgrading the ArchiCAD plugin or Revit.
'
' Placeholders replaced at runtime:
'   {{ARCHICAD_IMPORT_COMMANDS}}  Captured plugin commands (inc. IFC path)
'   {{OUTPUT_RVT_PATH}}           Absolute path where the .rvt should be saved
'   {{REVIT_VERSION}}             e.g. 2025.000

Dim Jrn
Set Jrn = CrsJournalScript

' --- Startup directives (must match Revit version) -----------------------
Jrn.Directive  _
        "CategoryDisciplineFilter"  , 63
Jrn.Directive  _
        "DisciplineOption"  , 32253
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "StayOnModifyInProject" , 0
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "StayOnModifyInFamily" , 1
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "ActiveCtOnSelection" , 1
Jrn.Data  _
        "JournalDefaultTemplate"  , "Metric Multi-discipline=$AllUsersAppData\Templates\English\Default-Multi-Discipline_Metric.rte"
Jrn.Data  _
        "JournalDefaultViewDiscipline"  , "Coordination"
Jrn.Directive  _
        "Version"  , "{{REVIT_VERSION}}" , "2.179"

' --- Create new empty Metric project (no template) -----------------------
  Jrn.Command "Ribbon"  , "Create a new project , ID_FILE_NEW_CHOOSE_TEMPLATE"
    Jrn.ComboBox "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "Control_Revit_TemplateCombo"  _
              , "SelEndOk"  , "<None>"
    Jrn.ComboBox "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "Control_Revit_TemplateCombo"  _
              , "Select"  , "<None>"
    Jrn.PushButton "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "OK, IDOK"
    Jrn.Data  _
            "TaskDialogResult"  , "Which system of measurement do you want to use in your project?" ,  _
             "Metric"  _
            , "1002"

' --- Switch to Add-Ins ribbon tab ----------------------------------------
  Jrn.RibbonEvent "TabActivated:Add-Ins"

' === ARCHICAD PLUGIN IMPORT COMMANDS (captured) ==========================
' These commands are version-specific and must be re-captured if the
' ArchiCAD plugin or Revit is updated.  The IFC file path is baked into
' the APIStringStringMapJournalData block.
{{ARCHICAD_IMPORT_COMMANDS}}
' === END PLUGIN COMMANDS =================================================

' --- Dismiss "Document Opened" warning dialog ----------------------------
    Jrn.PushButton "Modal , Autodesk Revit 2025 , Dialog_Revit_DocWarnDialog"  _
              , "OK, IDOK"

' --- Wait for import processing ------------------------------------------
' Revit processes the IFC; this can take 30-120+ seconds for large files.
' The journal player waits automatically.

' --- Save the imported model to output path ------------------------------
  Jrn.Command "Ribbon"  , "Save the active project , ID_REVIT_FILE_SAVE"
  Jrn.Data  _
          "File Name"  , "IDOK" , "{{OUTPUT_RVT_PATH}}"

' --- Exit Revit -----------------------------------------------------------
  Jrn.Command "Internal"  , "Quit the application; prompts to save projects , ID_APP_EXIT"
